text.title: Supply Chain Security: Secrets, SCA, SBOM, SLSA Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Supply Chain Security: Secrets, SCA, SBOM, SLSA methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-deps
step.action: Read every dependency manifest in the repo.
step.decision-gate: Missing lock files flagged as r2 violation.

step.name: wire-secret-scanning
step.action: Install Gitleaks / detect-secrets pre-commit + CI on full history.

step.name: wire-sca
step.action: Wire SCA (Trivy / Snyk / Dependabot) per ecosystem.
step.decision-gate: Auto-merge of major version bumps forbidden.

step.name: generate-sbom
step.decision-gate: SBOM regression (fewer components than prior build) fails CI.

step.name: define-license-policy
step.action: Deny-by-default with explicit allowlist (MIT / Apache-2.0 / BSD-3 / MPL-2.0).
step.decision-gate: GPL-3.0 / AGPL-3.0 require explicit legal signoff.
